main.description: A reference to a timer recipe that the user has saved to their collection. The rkey should be derived from the timer's rkey to enforce one save per timer per user.

timerUri.description: AT URI reference to the app.brew-haiku.timer record (e.g., 'at://did:plc:xxx/app.brew-haiku.timer/yyy')

savedAt.description: Timestamp when the timer was saved
